findings.message: The call-site inventory is internally inconsistent. It says three call sites use buildThreadContext(), but the regenerate route does not call it and instead manually builds { messages: ... }. The evidence supports two direct buildThreadContext() callers (sync.server.ts:662, recovery.server.ts:183) plus one separate regenerate-route context builder.

The test landscape incorrectly says regenerate-route unit coverage was Not found. The repo already has regenerate-route tests in apps/reception/src/app/api/mcp/__tests__/inbox-actions.route.test.ts. The real gap is missing bounding-specific assertions.

The post-delivery measurement plan overstates observability. Current inbox telemetry is event-based, while draft quality results are stored in quality_json/interpret_json on draft rows. That is queryable data, but not existing telemetry.
The D1-persistence framing is broader than the code evidence supports. Only derived thread_summary is persisted, not raw threadContext.messages.
